# OGENCI — Global ROI Architecture

> A premier global digital agency rooted in Africa. We build high-converting digital ecosystems, run ROI-driven ad campaigns, and deploy AI systems that scale businesses worldwide.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://ogenci.com/): Agency overview, services, pricing, portfolio preview
- [Work / Case Studies](https://ogenci.com/work): Portfolio of web design, AI, and advertising projects
- [Insights](https://ogenci.com/insights): Research on B2B conversion, attribution, and AI operations
- [Book a Session](https://ogenci.com/book): Schedule a strategy audit

## Case Studies

- [Jonmoore International](https://ogenci.com/work/jonmoore): Enterprise redesign for West Africa's leading heavy logistics provider
- [ISA Ghana](https://ogenci.com/work/isa-ghana): Digital transformation for the International School of Accra
- [BJH Logistics](https://ogenci.com/work/bjh-logistics): Full-scale digital platform for a premium logistics firm
- [Accra Grammar](https://ogenci.com/work/accra-grammar): Digital identity and enrollment platform for a leading school
- [Rich Jane School](https://ogenci.com/work/rich-jane-school): K-12 digital platform for a premier preschool
- [Wesleyan CM](https://ogenci.com/work/wesleyan): Digital ecosystem for a multi-national ministry

## Insights

- [African Tech Leap](https://ogenci.com/insights/african-tech-leap): Why Ghana's tech ecosystem is the next frontier for global ROI
- [Attribution Metrics 2026](https://ogenci.com/insights/attribution-metrics-2026): Redefining digital attribution for the AI era
- [Autonomous AI Agents](https://ogenci.com/insights/autonomous-ai-agents): How autonomous AI agents are reshaping digital operations
- [Tech Regulations](https://ogenci.com/insights/the-tech-regulations): Navigating the new landscape of technology regulations

## Services

- Web Design: High-conversion, editorial-style websites
- Paid Advertising: ROI-driven ad campaigns
- AI & Automation: Custom AI systems for business operations
- Retainers: Ongoing maintenance, security, and optimization
